zh.lifeSummary: 當King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond於1395年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯時，他的父親King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond41歲，母親Slaine MacNamara23歲。他和Catherine De Burgh至少有8個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1459年4月在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond于1395年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯时，他的父亲King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond41岁，母亲Slaine MacNamara23岁。他和Catherine De Burgh至少有8个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1459年4月在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

nameMeanings.name: Toirdhealbhach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from a byname meaning ‘instigator’, from toirdhealbh ‘prompting’. It was the name of a High King of Ireland who died in 1156 .

variants.name: Turlough
meanings: Anglicized form of   Toirdhealbhach .

variants.name: Tárlach
meanings: Modern reduced form of Toirdhealbhach , pronounced ‘tor-lakh’.

variants.name: Traolach
meanings: Dialectal form of   Toirdhealbhach .

nameMeanings.name: Bog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered short form of Robert , a later development than the common medieval forms Hob, Dob, and Nob, all of which, unlike Bob, have given rise to English surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond was born in 1395, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, his father, King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond, was 41 and his mother, Slaine MacNamara, was 23. He had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Catherine De Burgh. He died in April 1459, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond est né en 1395, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, son père, King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Slaine MacNamara, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Catherine De Burgh. Il est décédé en avril 1459, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond 1395 in Ennis, County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond 41 und seine Mutter Slaine MacNamara 23. Er hatte mit Catherine De Burgh mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1459 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond è nato il nel 1395 nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Slaine MacNamara, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Catherine De Burgh. Morì nel aprile 1459, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomondが1395年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで生まれた時，父King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomondは41歳，母Slaine MacNamaraは23歳であった。彼はCatherine De Burghとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1459年4月に故郷で64歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスエニス 1にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond(이)가 1395년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Slaine MacNamara(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Catherine De Burgh(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 4월 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스 니스 1에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond nasceu em 1395, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Slaine MacNamara, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Catherine De Burgh. Ele faleceu em abril de 1459, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond родился в 1395 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Slaine MacNamara, 23. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Catherine De Burgh. Он умер апрель 1459 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности эннис 1, эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1444 to 1459: mai le 1444 e o'o I le 1459

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond nació en 1395, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Slaine MacNamara, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Catherine De Burgh. Murió en abril de 1459, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.
